debug_info.goal:
case zero
L : Logic ℕ
χ ξ : Formula ℕ
T : LO.Propositional.FTheory L
hT : χ ➝ ξ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
φ : Formula ℕ
Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)
hΓ : ↑Γ ⊆ LO.Propositional.FTheory.lindenbaum.construction L χ ξ T hT (encode φ)
hφ : Γ.conj ⋏ φ ➝ ξ ∈ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T
⊢ χ ➝ φ ∉ LO.Propositional.FTheory.theory L T

failed_attempts:
have : ∀ k, ∀ Δ : Finset _, ↑Δ ⊆ construction T hT k → Δ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
      intro k

split at h
    · split_ifs at h with hc
      · cases h with
        | inl heq =>
          subst heq
          -- φ was just added. decode i = φ.
          have : i = encode φ := encode_injective (by rw [‹decode i = some φ›]

. exact hΓ
    . apply T.imp_closed (φ := Γ.conj ⋏ φ)

intro h
    have consistent : ∀ i, ∀ Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ), ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT i → Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
      intro i

intro h
    have h_cons : ∀ j, ∀ Δ : Finset (Formula ℕ), ↑Δ ⊆ construction T hT j → Δ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
      intro j
      induction j with
      | zero =>
        intro Δ hΔ
        have : χ ➝ Δ.conj ∈ T.theory := by
          simp [construction] at hΔ
          induction Δ using Finset.induction_on with
          | empty =>
             simp
             apply T.L_subset
             grind
          | insert δ Δ hδ ih =>
             simp [Finset.conj_insert]
             apply T.imp_closed (φ := (χ ➝ δ) ⋏ (χ ➝ Δ.conj))
             . grind
             . apply T.andIR
               . apply hΔ

. exact hΓ
    have h_imp : (Γ.insert φ).conj ➝ ξ ∈ T.theory := by simp [Finset.conj_insert]

intro h
    have : ∀ i, ∀ Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ), ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT i → Γ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
      intro i

intro hφ0
    have h_cons : ∀ k, ∀ Λ : Finset (Formula ℕ), ↑Λ ⊆ construction T hT k → Λ.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
      intro k

match hg : decode k with
      | none => exact ih
      | some δ =>
        by_cases h_cond : ∀ (Γ : Finset (Formula ℕ)), ↑Γ ⊆ construction T hT k → Γ.conj ⋏ δ ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory

intro hφ0
    have h_cons : ∀ i, ∀ s : Finset (Formula ℕ), ↑s ⊆ construction T hT i → s.conj ➝ ξ ∉ T.theory := by
